title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
